untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking of: (1) Leading stocks top 20% YTD performers and their individual 50-day MA crosses - requires multi-asset analysis and YTD ranking not available in single-bar indicators; (2) Advance/decline line (market breadth indicator) - not in allowed indicator list; (3) Federal Reserve discount rate hikes - external macro data not available in price/technical indicators. The signal is fundamentally a regime detection rule requiring market-wide breadth analysis and macro policy tracking that cannot be expressed with single-security OHLCV and technical indicators alone.
translation_notes: This is a market regime deterioration signal from Schwager requiring market breadth (A/D line), sector leadership rotation analysis, and Fed policy monitoring. A partial translation using price action alone (close below SMA) would lose 2/3 of the signal's discriminative power. Recommend: (1) Integrate advance/decline line as custom indicator; (2) Create leading stock index or sector rotation metric; (3) Add Fed rate schedule as external data source.
